After undergoing the holy ablation the king should wear a pair
of cotton cloths that have been sanctified by the three Mantras of
the hymn beginning with 'Apo hi ftkU* and by the four beginning with
' HiranyavarnUm.
[The Mantra fApo hi $thU9 is used for purification. This is done
daily by every twice-born. 'Hiranyavarnam harinlm suvarnarajata-
srajam' is the commencement of the Srlsukta. The former is meant
